race.comment: COSTABIT (7) had excuses at all three runs this time in and looks ready to peak fourth-up. Taken back from the wide gate and struggled in the heavy going with a battling last over this journey at Rosehill in BM72 grade. Blinkers come off and set to deliver from the good draw. I'VE BEAN TRYIN' (1) tough seven-year-old gelding who finds a winnable race today. Went back early and pinched ground along the inside with a respectable fifth over 1500m at Rosehill in BM78 grade. Claim helps and shapes as the main danger. SQUEEZEBOX (5) stalked the pace and never surrendered with the 59.5kg for a tidy third over 1600m at Gosford. Hard fit now and can take a hand in the finish. PREFER DIAMONDS (9) senior rider on today and looks close to her best third-up. Raced handy from the wide barrier with a close-up fifth over 1400m at Newcastle. Both wins have come at this course and distance and has genuine winning prospects.
